41: export async function listDocuments() {
42:   const rows = db
43:     .prepare(
44:       `SELECT id, filename, title, markdown_chars, status, error, created_at
45:        FROM documents ORDER BY datetime(created_at) DESC`
46:     )
47:     .all() as Array<
48:     Pick<DocumentRow, 'id' | 'filename' | 'title' | 'markdown_chars' | 'status' | 'error' | 'created_at'>
49:   >
50:   return rows.map((r) => {
51:     const planRow = db
52:       .prepare(
53:         `SELECT id, difficulty, status FROM lesson_plans WHERE document_id = ? ORDER BY datetime(created_at) DESC LIMIT 1`
54:       )
55:       .get(r.id) as { id: number; difficulty: string; status: string } | undefined
56:     const attemptCount = (
57:       db
58:         .prepare(
59:           `SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM attempts a JOIN lesson_plans p ON p.id = a.lesson_plan_id WHERE p.document_id = ?`
60:         )
61:         .get(r.id) as { c: number }
62:     ).c
63:     return {
64:       ...r,
65:       plan: planRow
66:         ? {
67:             id: planRow.id,
68:             difficulty: planRow.difficulty,
69:             status: planRow.status
70:           }
71:         : null,
72:       attemptCount
73:     }
74:   })
75: }
76: 
77: export async function getDocument(id: number) {
78:   const row = db.prepare(`SELECT * FROM documents WHERE id = ?`).get(id) as DocumentRow | undefined
79:   if (!row) return null
80:   return {
81:     id: row.id,
82:     filename: row.filename,
83:     title: row.title,
84:     status: row.status,
85:     markdown_chars: row.markdown_chars,
86:     created_at: row.created_at,
87:     error: row.error
88:   }
89: }
90: 
91: export async function getDocumentMarkdown(id: number): Promise<string | null> {
92:   const row = db.prepare(`SELECT markdown FROM documents WHERE id = ?`).get(id) as
93:     | { markdown: string | null }
94:     | undefined
95:   return row?.markdown ?? null
96: }
97: 
98: export async function uploadAndConvert(filename: string, buffer: Buffer): Promise<DocumentRow> {
99:   const storedFilename = `${Date.now()}-${nanoid(8)}-${filename.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9.\-_ ]/g, '')}`
100:   const filepath = path.join(UPLOADS_DIR, storedFilename)
101:   const { writeFile } = await import('node:fs/promises')
102:   await writeFile(filepath, buffer)
103: 
104:   const doc = db
105:     .prepare(
106:       `INSERT INTO documents (filename, stored_filename, filepath, status)
107:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'processing')
108:        RETURNING *`
109:     )
110:     .get(filename, storedFilename, filepath) as DocumentRow
111: 
112:   convertPdfToMarkdown(filepath)
113:     .then(async (result) => {
114:       if (!result.ok) {
115:         db.prepare(`UPDATE documents SET status = 'failed', error = ? WHERE id = ?`).run(
116:           result.error ?? 'Unknown error',
117:           doc.id
118:         )
119:         return
120:       }
121:       db.prepare(
122:         `UPDATE documents SET status = 'ready', markdown = ?, markdown_chars = ?, error = NULL WHERE id = ?`
123:       ).run(result.markdown, result.markdown.length, doc.id)
124:     })
125:     .catch((err: unknown) => {
126:       db.prepare(`UPDATE documents SET status = 'failed', error = ? WHERE id = ?`).run((err as Error).message, doc.id)
127:     })
128: 
129:   return doc
130: }
131: 
132: export async function createPlan(documentId: number) {
133:   const doc = db.prepare(`SELECT * FROM documents WHERE id = ?`).get(documentId) as DocumentRow | undefined
134:   if (!doc) throw new Error('Document not found')
135:   if (doc.status !== 'ready' || !doc.markdown) {
136:     throw new Error(`Document is not ready for plan generation (status: ${doc.status})`)
137:   }
138: 
139:   const plan = await generatePlan(doc.markdown, doc.filename)
140:   const objectivesJson = JSON.stringify(plan.objectives)
141:   const res = db
142:     .prepare(
143:       `INSERT INTO lesson_plans (document_id, title, description, objectives, difficulty, status)
144:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'draft')
145:        RETURNING *`
146:     )
147:     .get(documentId, plan.title, plan.description, objectivesJson, plan.difficulty) as LessonPlanRow
148: 
149:   return {
150:     id: res.id,
151:     document_id: documentId,
152:     title: res.title,
153:     description: res.description,
154:     difficulty: res.difficulty as 'beginner' | 'intermediate' | 'advanced',
155:     objectives: plan.objectives,
156:     status: res.status as 'draft' | 'approved' | 'completed',
157:     created_at: res.created_at
158:   }
159: }
160: 
161: export async function getPlan(planId: number) {
162:   const row = db.prepare(`SELECT * FROM lesson_plans WHERE id = ?`).get(planId) as LessonPlanRow | undefined
163:   if (!row) return null
164:   const doc = db.prepare(`SELECT filename FROM documents WHERE id = ?`).get(row.document_id) as { filename: string }
165:   return {
166:     id: row.id,
167:     document_id: row.document_id,
168:     document_filename: doc.filename,
169:     title: row.title,
170:     description: row.description,
171:     difficulty: row.difficulty as 'beginner' | 'intermediate' | 'advanced',

173:     status: row.status as 'draft' | 'approved' | 'completed',

176: }

178: export async function getPlansForDocument(documentId: number) {
179:   const rows = db

181:     .all(documentId) as LessonPlanRow[]

190:     created_at: row.created_at

193: 
194: export async function approvePlan(planId: number) {
195:   const row = db.prepare(`SELECT * FROM lesson_plans WHERE id = ?`).get(planId) as LessonPlanRow | undefined
196:   if (!row) throw new Error('Plan not found')
197:   if (row.status === 'draft') {
198:     db.prepare(`UPDATE lesson_plans SET status = 'approved' WHERE id = ?`).run(planId)
199:   }
200:   return getPlan(planId)
201: }

203: export async function getOrCreateQuiz(planId: number, objectiveIndex: number): Promise<QuizDTO> {
204:   const plan = await getPlan(planId)
205:   if (!plan) throw new Error('Plan not found')
206:   const objective = plan.objectives[objectiveIndex]
207:   if (!objective) throw new Error(`Objective ${objectiveIndex} not found`)
208: 
209:   const existing = db
210:     .prepare(`SELECT * FROM quiz_questions WHERE lesson_plan_id = ? AND objective_index = ?`)
211:     .get(planId, objectiveIndex) as QuizQuestionRow | undefined
212: 
213:   if (existing) {
214:     return {
215:       id: existing.id,
216:       objectiveIndex: existing.objective_index,
217:       objectiveText: existing.objective_text,
218:       question: existing.question,
219:       options: JSON.parse(existing.options),
220:       hint: existing.hint
221:     }
222:   }
223: 
224:   const markdown = await getDocumentMarkdown(plan.document_id)
225:   if (!markdown) throw new Error('Source document has no markdown content')
226:   const quiz = await generateQuiz(markdown, objective.text, objective.topic)
227: 
228:   const res = db
229:     .prepare(
230:       `INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lesson_plan_id, objective_index, objective_text, question, options, correct_index, explanation, hint)
231:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
232:        RETURNING id`
233:     )
234:     .get(
235:       planId,
236:       objectiveIndex,
237:       objective.text,
238:       quiz.question,
239:       JSON.stringify(quiz.options),
240:       quiz.correct_index,
241:       quiz.explanation,
242:       quiz.hint
243:     ) as { id: number }
244: 
245:   return {
246:     id: res.id,
247:     objectiveIndex,
248:     objectiveText: objective.text,
249:     question: quiz.question,
250:     options: quiz.options,
251:     hint: quiz.hint
252:   }
253: }
254: 
255: export async function getAllQuizzes(planId: number): Promise<QuizDTO[]> {
256:   const plan = await getPlan(planId)
257:   if (!plan) return []
258:   const rows = db
259:     .prepare(`SELECT * FROM quiz_questions WHERE lesson_plan_id = ? ORDER BY objective_index ASC`)
260:     .all(planId) as QuizQuestionRow[]
261:   return rows.map((r) => ({
262:     id: r.id,
263:     objectiveIndex: r.objective_index,
264:     objectiveText: r.objective_text,
265:     question: r.question,
266:     options: JSON.parse(r.options),
267:     hint: r.hint
268:   }))
269: }
270: 
271: export async function getQuizInternal(quizId: number): Promise<QuizQuestionRow | null> {
272:   return (db.prepare(`SELECT * FROM quiz_questions WHERE id = ?`).get(quizId) as QuizQuestionRow | undefined) ?? null
273: }
274: 
275: export async function getHint(quizId: number, previousGuessIndex: number | null): Promise<string> {
276:   const quiz = await getQuizInternal(quizId)
277:   if (!quiz) throw new Error('Quiz not found')
278:   const plan = await getPlan(quiz.lesson_plan_id)
279:   if (!plan) throw new Error('Plan not found')
280:   const markdown = await getDocumentMarkdown(plan.document_id)
281:   if (!markdown) throw new Error('Source document has no markdown content')
282:   const options = JSON.parse(quiz.options) as string[]
283:   return generateRetryHint(
284:     markdown,
285:     quiz.question,
286:     options,
287:     previousGuessIndex !== null ? options[previousGuessIndex] : null
288:   )
289: }
290: 
291: export async function getExplanation(quizId: number): Promise<{
292:   explanation: string
293:   correctIndex: number
294: }> {
295:   const quiz = await getQuizInternal(quizId)
296:   if (!quiz) throw new Error('Quiz not found')
297:   const plan = await getPlan(quiz.lesson_plan_id)
298:   if (!plan) throw new Error('Plan not found')
299:   const markdown = await getDocumentMarkdown(plan.document_id)
300:   if (!markdown) throw new Error('Source document has no markdown content')
301:   const options = JSON.parse(quiz.options) as string[]
302:   const correct = options[quiz.correct_index]
303:   const explanation = await explainCorrect(markdown, quiz.question, options, correct, quiz.correct_index)
304:   return { explanation, correctIndex: quiz.correct_index }
305: }
306: 
307: export async function checkAnswer(
308:   quizId: number,
309:   learnerIndex: number
310: ): Promise<{ correct: boolean; explanation?: string }> {
311:   const quiz = await getQuizInternal(quizId)
312:   if (!quiz) throw new Error('Quiz not found')
313:   const correct = learnerIndex === quiz.correct_index
314:   if (!correct) return { correct: false }
315:   const { explanation } = await getExplanation(quizId)
316:   return { correct: true, explanation }
317: }
318: 
319: export async function learnMoreAboutQuiz(
320:   quizId: number,
321:   learnerQuestion: string,
322:   history: Array<{ role: 'user' | 'assistant'; content: string }>
323: ): Promise<string> {
324:   const quiz = await getQuizInternal(quizId)
325:   if (!quiz) throw new Error('Quiz not found')
326:   const plan = await getPlan(quiz.lesson_plan_id)
327:   if (!plan) throw new Error('Plan not found')
328:   const markdown = await getDocumentMarkdown(plan.document_id)
329:   if (!markdown) throw new Error('Source document has no markdown content')
330:   const options = JSON.parse(quiz.options) as string[]
331:   return learnMore(markdown, quiz.question, options, learnerQuestion, history)
332: }
333: 
334: export async function completeAttempt(
335:   planId: number,
336:   payload: {
337:     answers: Array<{
338:       quizId: number
339:       learnerIndex: number | null
340:       attempts: number
341:     }>
342:   }
343: ): Promise<AttemptSummaryDTO> {
344:   const plan = await getPlan(planId)
345:   if (!plan) throw new Error('Plan not found')
346: 
347:   const markdown = await getDocumentMarkdown(plan.document_id)
348:   if (!markdown) throw new Error('Source document has no markdown content')
349: 
350:   const questions: AttemptInput['questions'] = []
351:   let score = 0
352:   for (const ans of payload.answers) {
353:     const quiz = await getQuizInternal(ans.quizId)
354:     if (!quiz || quiz.lesson_plan_id !== planId) continue
355:     const options = JSON.parse(quiz.options) as string[]
356:     const correct = ans.learnerIndex === quiz.correct_index
357:     if (correct) score += 1
358:     questions.push({
359:       objectiveText: quiz.objective_text,
360:       question: quiz.question,
361:       options,
362:       correctIndex: quiz.correct_index,
363:       learnerIndex: ans.learnerIndex,
364:       attempts: ans.attempts
365:     })
366:   }
367: 
368:   const summary = await generateSummary({
369:     objectives: plan.objectives.map((o) => ({
370:       text: o.text,
371:       topic: o.topic
372:     })),
373:     questions,
374:     markdown
375:   })
376: 
377:   db
378:     .prepare(
379:       `INSERT INTO attempts (lesson_plan_id, score, total, answers, summary, study_tips)
380:      VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
381:      RETURNING id`
382:     )
383:     .get(
384:       planId,
385:       score,
386:       questions.length,
387:       JSON.stringify(payload.answers),
388:       summary.summary,
389:       JSON.stringify(summary.study_tips)
390:     ) as { id: number }
391: 
392:   db.prepare(`UPDATE lesson_plans SET status = 'completed' WHERE id = ?`).run(planId)
393: 
394:   return {
395:     score,
396:     total: questions.length,
397:     summary: summary.summary,
398:     studyTips: summary.study_tips,
399:     weakTopics: summary.weak_topics,
400:     strengths: summary.strengths,
401:     answers: questions.map((q) => ({
402:       question: q.question,
403:       options: q.options,
404:       correctIndex: q.correctIndex,
405:       learnerIndex: q.learnerIndex,
406:       attempts: q.attempts,
407:       objectiveText: q.objectiveText
408:     }))
409:   }
410: }
411: 
412: export async function listAttempts(planId: number) {
413:   const rows = db
414:     .prepare(`SELECT * FROM attempts WHERE lesson_plan_id = ? ORDER BY datetime(created_at) DESC`)
415:     .all(planId) as AttemptRow[]
416:   return rows.map((r) => ({
417:     id: r.id,
418:     lesson_plan_id: r.lesson_plan_id,
419:     score: r.score,
420:     total: r.total,
421:     summary: r.summary,
422:     study_tips: JSON.parse(r.study_tips) as string[],
423:     created_at: r.created_at
424:   }))
425: }
426: 
427: export async function getAttempt(attemptId: number) {
428:   const row = db.prepare(`SELECT * FROM attempts WHERE id = ?`).get(attemptId) as AttemptRow | undefined
429:   if (!row) return null
430:   return {
431:     id: row.id,

433:     score: row.score,

435:     summary: row.summary,
436:     study_tips: JSON.parse(row.study_tips) as string[],

438:   }
439: }

import Database from 'better-sqlite3'
import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'
import { join } from 'node:path'
import { DB_PATH, ROOT_DIR } from './config.ts'

export const db = new Database(DB_PATH)
db.pragma('journal_mode = WAL')
db.pragma('foreign_keys = ON')

export const SCHEMA_SQL = readFileSync(join(ROOT_DIR, 'src', 'schema.sql'), { encoding: 'utf-8' })

export interface DocumentRow {
  id: number
  filename: string
  stored_filename: string
  filepath: string
  title: string
  markdown: string | null
  markdown_chars: number
  status: string

display.text:
import Database from 'better-sqlite3'
import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'
import { join } from 'node:path'
import { DB_PATH, ROOT_DIR } from './config.ts'

export const db = new Database(DB_PATH)
db.pragma('journal_mode = WAL')
db.pragma('foreign_keys = ON')

export const SCHEMA_SQL = readFileSync(join(ROOT_DIR, 'src', 'schema.sql'), { encoding: 'utf-8' })

export interface DocumentRow {
  id: number
  filename: string
  stored_filename: string
  filepath: string
  title: string
  markdown: string | null
  markdown_chars: number
  status: string
  error: string | null
  created_at: string
}

export interface LessonPlanRow {
  id: number
  document_id: number
  title: string
  description: string
  objectives: string
  difficulty: string
  status: string
  created_at: string
}

export interface QuizQuestionRow {
  id: number
  lesson_plan_id: number
  objective_index: number
  objective_text: string
  question: string
  options: string
  correct_index: number
  explanation: string
  hint: string
  created_at: string
}

export interface AttemptRow {
  id: number
  lesson_plan_id: number
  score: number
  total: number
  answers: string
  summary: string
  study_tips: string
  created_at: string
}

1: import { resolve, dirname } from 'node:path'
2: import { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url'
3: 
4: export const ROOT_DIR = resolve(dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)), '..')
5: export const UPLOADS_DIR = resolve(ROOT_DIR, 'uploads')
6: export const DB_PATH = resolve(ROOT_DIR, 'data', 'learning.db')
7: 
8: export const PORT = parseInt(process.env.PORT ?? '3003', 10)

data.text:
Now I have a clear picture of the codebase. Let me plan the refactoring:

The file `learning.ts` (439 lines) has these logical domains:

1. **Documents** - upload, list, get, get markdown (lines 41-130)
2. **Lesson Plans** - create, get, list, approve (lines 132-201)
3. **Quizzes** - create/get, list all, get internal, hints, explanations, check answer, learn more (lines 203-332)
4. **Attempts** - complete attempt, list attempts, get attempt (lines 334-439)

I also need a **types** file for the shared DTOs (`Objective`, `QuizDTO`, `AttemptSummaryDTO`).


Since everything's exported through the namespace `import * as svc from '../services/learning.ts'`, I'll keep the barrel file in place and create the new modules alongside it. My approach is to extract shared types first, then split each domain into its own file, and finally update the main barrel to re-export everything.
I have a clear picture now. The file has 4 distinct domains: Documents, Lesson Plans, Quizzes, and Attempts, plus shared types. Let me create the refactored files.

data.text:
Let me create all the files now. The domain split:

1. **types.ts** - `Objective`, `QuizDTO`, `AttemptSummaryDTO`
2. **documents.ts** - `listDocuments`, `getDocument`, `getDocumentMarkdown`, `uploadAndConvert`
3. **plans.ts** - `createPlan`, `getPlan`, `getPlansForDocument`, `approvePlan`
4. **quizzes.ts** - `getOrCreateQuiz`, `getAllQuizzes`, `getQuizInternal`, `getHint`, `getExplanation`, `checkAnswer`, `learnMoreAboutQuiz`


5. **attempts.ts** - `completeAttempt`, `listAttempts`, `getAttempt`

I need to work through the dependencies carefully. `getDocumentMarkdown` is used by quizzes and attempts to fetch the source content, but it's logically a document operation, so I'll put it in documents.ts and have the other modules import it from there.

Now I'm mapping out what each module needs to import. Documents only needs `db`, types, and utilities like `nanoid` and `convertPdfToMarkdown`. Plans depends on documents and the `generatePlan` agent. Quizzes needs both documents and plans since `getOrCreateQuiz` and other functions rely on `getPlan`. Attempts pulls from plans, documents, and the `generateSummary` agent.

I'm noticing the type dependencies too—`QuizDTO` is used by quiz functions while `AttemptSummaryDTO` is for attempt functions, so I'll put those in a shared types file. I'm also noticing that `getQuizInternal` is only used within quizzes, and `getHint` doesn't actually need `getExplanation` since it calls `generateRetryHint` directly. Now I'll start writing out the modules.

export interface Objective {
  text: string
  topic: string
}

export interface QuizDTO {
  id: number
  objectiveIndex: number
  objectiveText: string
  question: string
  options: string[]
  hint: string
}

export interface AttemptSummaryDTO {
  score: number
  total: number
  summary: string
  studyTips: string[]
  weakTopics: string[]
  strengths: string[]
  answers: Array<{
    question: string
    options: string[]
    correctIndex: number
    learnerIndex: number | null
    attempts: number
    objectiveText: string
  }>
}

      learnerIndex: q.learnerIndex,
      attempts: q.attempts,
      objectiveText: q.objectiveText
    }))
  }
}

data.text:
The issue is that `questions` is of type `AttemptInput['questions']` and `AttemptInput` comes from `'../agent/summary.ts'` which can't be resolved. The original file had the same issue. Let me check if the original file had this TS error too by reverting and checking. Actually, the original file imported `AttemptInput` from `'../agent/summary.ts'` which also wouldn't resolve. So this is a pre-existing type issue.

The TS7006 error is because `AttemptInput` can't be resolved (the import fails), so `questions` becomes `any[]`, making `q` implicitly `any`.


Since the import path is wrong, the type inference breaks down and that's why `q` gets inferred as `any`. The original file had the exact same import, so this isn't a new issue from my refactor.
